channel.title: NPR Topics: World
channel.description: NPR world news, international art and culture, world business and financial markets, world economy, and global trends in health, science and technology. Subscribe to the World Story of the Day podcast and RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Here are the most important developments in Iran in the past 24 hours
item.description: President Trump is offering some indication about how long the war with Iran might last.
item.content:encoded: President Trump is offering some indication about how long the war with Iran might last.
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: Some Middle East flights resume, but thousands of travelers are still stranded by war
item.description: Limited flights out of the Middle East resumed on Monday. But hundreds of thousands of travelers are still stranded in the region after attacks on Iran by the U.S. and Israel.
item.content:encoded:
Limited flights out of the Middle East resumed on Monday. But hundreds of thousands of travelers are still stranded in the region after attacks on Iran by the U.S. and Israel.

(Image credit: Fadel Senna)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Oil prices surge, but no panic yet, as Iran war continues
item.description: Global oil prices are in the high $70s as traffic through Strait of Hormuz comes to a halt. Some analysts have warned they could top $100 a barrel if the stoppage is prolonged.
item.content:encoded:
Global oil prices are in the high $70s as traffic through Strait of Hormuz comes to a halt. Some analysts have warned they could top $100 a barrel if the stoppage is prolonged.

(Image credit: Fadel Senna)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Trump defends Iran strikes, offers objectives for military operation
item.description: His remarks are the first public ones to reporters since the U.S.-Israeli military operation against Iran began Saturday despite weeks of talks designed to stave off a conflict.
item.content:encoded:
His remarks are the first public ones to reporters since the U.S.-Israeli military operation against Iran began Saturday despite weeks of talks designed to stave off a conflict.

(Image credit: Andrew Harnik)
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk

item.title: U.S., Israel's war with Iran widens. And, Texas primaries test Latino support for GOP
item.description: Israel trades fire with Hezbollah, widening the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran into Lebanon. And, Texas primaries could test if Latino support for the GOP remains strong after 2024's gains.
item.content:encoded:
Israel trades fire with Hezbollah, widening the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran into Lebanon. And, Texas primaries could test if Latino support for the GOP remains strong after 2024's gains.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: 6 U.S. soldiers have been killed as the war with Iran further engulfs the region
item.description: The war over Iran engulfed more of the Middle East and beyond on Monday as strikes intensified, Iran-backed groups stepped up attacks and a sixth U.S. service member was killed in action.
item.content:encoded:
The war over Iran engulfed more of the Middle East and beyond on Monday as strikes intensified, Iran-backed groups stepped up attacks and a sixth U.S. service member was killed in action.

(Image credit: Mohsen Ganji)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Hezbollah strikes Israel as American and Israeli planes pound Iran
item.description: Iran and Iranian-backed militias fired missiles at Israel and Arab states, apparently hitting the U.S. Embassy compound in Kuwait, while Israel and the United States pounded targets in Iran on Monday.
item.content:encoded:
Iran and Iranian-backed militias fired missiles at Israel and Arab states, apparently hitting the U.S. Embassy compound in Kuwait, while Israel and the United States pounded targets in Iran on Monday.

(Image credit: Hassan Ammar)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: 7 key points in U.S.-Iran relations since 1953
item.description: The U.S. and Iran have a long history of tensions, including a CIA-led campaign to topple Iran's prime minister in 1953 and the taking of American hostages in 1979.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. and Iran have a long history of tensions, including a CIA-led campaign to topple Iran's prime minister in 1953 and the taking of American hostages in 1979.

(Image credit: AFP Files Intercontinentale)
item.dc:creator: Joe Hernandez

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: U.S. and Israel continue attacks against Iran, three American service members killed and Trump says more deaths are "likely," Iran targets Gulf states and U.S. bases as retaliation.
item.content:encoded: U.S. and Israel continue attacks against Iran, three American service members killed and Trump says more deaths are "likely," Iran targets Gulf states and U.S. bases as retaliation.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: War with Iran strands hundreds of thousands of travelers across the Middle East
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of travelers have been stranded by the outbreak of war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: Hundreds of thousands of travelers have been stranded by the outbreak of war with Iran.
item.dc:creator: Hosts
